title: Enlightened Ordinary
definition: The attainment and embodiment of enlightenment in everyday, ordinary life.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Being truly kind, compassionate, and wise even without any special title or recognition.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Achieving enlightenment in the context of daily life, demonstrating wisdom and compassion without seeking accolades.
difficulty_levels.expert: The realization that enlightenment can occur within ordinary lives, challenging traditional views of spirituality as separate from daily existence.

extra_fields.insight: Enlightenment is possible in everyday life, not just in secluded meditation or solitary retreats.
